articles.title: 📲 19 days until the World Cup, test yourself with our quiz
articles.description: TAP HERE TO ACCESS TODAY'S QUIZ There are 19 days left until the 2026 World Cup. To get into the World Cup spirit, OneFootball has prepared a series of special quizzes. Every day, until June 11, there will be a new quiz about the tournament. After taking it, tell us in the comments whether you got 10/10 or if it was very difficult. Did you miss any quiz? Take the previous ones too: Quiz 20 Quiz 21 Quiz 22 Quiz 23 Quiz 24 Quiz 25 Quiz 26 Quiz 27 Quiz 28 Quiz 29 Quiz 30 This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇪🇸 here.
